channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Police Injured in Clash With Villagers Over Road to Rayagada Mining Area in Odisha
item.description: In Odisha's Rayagada district, a major confrontation took place between the local villagers and the police as residents protested against a new road project meant to connect a mining site. The village...

item.title: IEBC Clarifies Missing Polling Station Details During Ongoing Voter Registration
item.description: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) has assured Kenyans not to worry after some voters noticed that their online voter verification results lacked polling station and stream det...

item.title: US and Israeli Strikes Target Iran’s Infrastructure Amid High Tensions
item.description: The United States launched attacks on military targets on Iran's Kharg Island, a critical hub for roughly 90 per cent of Iran’s oil exports, while Israel targeted bridges and railway lines in a coordi...

item.title: Artemis II Lunar Flyby: Observations of the Moon’s Far Side and Earth from Space
item.description: On the night of April 6–7, 2026, NASA's Artemis II mission reached a pivotal moment as the Orion Integrity spacecraft flew past the Moon. The crew observed up to 21% of the Moon's far side illuminated...

item.title: Navotas: PNP-HPG confiscates millions worth of suspected illegal fuel
item.description: The Philippine National Police’s Highway Patrol Group (PNP-HPG) has successfully seized approximately P9.7 million worth of suspected illegal fuel in Navotas City. The operation, conducted on April 08...

item.title: Federal Government Allocates ₦135bn for Post-Election Legal Contingencies in 2026 Budget
item.description: The Federal Government under President Bola Tinubu don put aside ₦135.22 billion for post-election litigation as part of the 2026 national budget, ahead of the 2027 elections. This fund dey for 'Elect...

item.title: Trump’s Iran Deadline Raises Global Concerns over Escalation
item.description: US President Donald Trump has issued an alarming statement on his Truth Social platform, warning that 'a whole civilisation will die tonight' as his deadline for Iran’s total surrender expires. The me...

item.title: Malabon’s Digital Initiatives Presented at Global Conference in Japan
item.description: At the 17th International Conference on e-Education, e-Business, e-Management, and e-Learning held in Fukuoka, Japan, Malabon City Administrator Alexander Rosete highlighted the city's digital governa...

item.title: Iran threatens global retaliation if US crosses its red lines
item.description: Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has issued a strong warning to the United States, saying any violation of its red lines could lead to attacks that go beyond the Middle East. This warni...

item.title: LTFRB Distributes Nearly P1 Billion in Fuel Aid to Public Utility Vehicle Drivers Nationwide
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has rolled out almost P1 billion in fuel subsidies to support drivers and operators of public utility vehicles (PUVs) across the Philip...

item.title: Shujaa Face Australia in Opening Match of World 7s Championship
item.description: Kenya's national men's rugby 7s team, Shujaa, will kick off their World Championship campaign against Australia on April 17 in Hong Kong. The match is set to begin at 12:56 pm local time and marks the...

item.title: Financial challenges for couples when one partner enters aged care
item.description: The article examines the financial pressures couples face when one partner enters aged care in Australia. It highlights how the system’s means-tested approach can create an uneven burden, where the pa...

item.title: Suspended Sgt Nkosi found with archived police case files and firearms at home
item.description: During a police raid on the Pretoria home of suspended Sgt Fannie Nkosi, authorities discovered several closed cash-in-transit (CIT) and hijacking case dockets that were not supposed to be in his poss...

item.title: Amazon Deal Roundup: 5 Recommended Products This Week
item.description: This week's Amazon deal roundup highlights five products recommended by a deal tracker who has been monitoring Amazon deals since 2019. The tracker emphasizes the importance of carefully reviewing dea...

item.title: Nakuru Fuel Crisis: Matatu Fares Soar as Supplies Dry Up
item.description: Nakuru residents are feeling the pinch of a severe fuel shortage, forcing matatu operators to significantly increase fares. The situation, triggered by an ongoing crisis in the Kenyan oil trade, has l...

item.title: Matt Canavan outlines plan to boost population, energy independence, and infrastructure in Australia
item.description: Nationals leader Matt Canavan has unveiled a five-point 'patriot agenda' aimed at transforming Australia into what he calls a 'hyper-Australia'. In his National Press Club address, Canavan emphasised ...

item.title: Trump Issues Stern Warning Over Strait of Hormuz Deadline Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump has warned in a very strong statement that an entire civilisation could be destroyed tonight if Iran does not meet the deadline to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. He made this d...

item.title: Marikina Restaurant Offers Free Meals to PUV Drivers, Delivery Riders
item.description: A restaurant in Marikina City has been extending a heartwarming gesture of support to public utility vehicle (PUV) drivers and delivery riders by providing them with free meals. This initiative, a for...

item.title: Church Steps in to Support Elderly Woman After Son's Death
item.description: Regina Neiman, an elderly Kenyan woman, lost her only son, Tumaini Amiri, in a tragic motorcycle accident. Left without close family support, Regina struggled with basic needs, including housing and t...

item.title: Veteran Nollywood Actor Davis Offor, Known As Clarus, Passes Away Peacefully
item.description: Naija News don report how veteran Nollywood actor Davis Offor, wey many sabi as Clarus from the old-time sitcom 'The New Masquerade', don pass away. The sad news come out after his colleague and close...
